slides.title: The vitamin that *puts calcium right*.
slides.sub: It's called vitamin K2, and it decides whether the calcium you eat ends up in your bones or your arteries. Most people have never heard of it.

slides.title: Calcium needs a traffic cop
slides.body: Taking calcium or vitamin D isn't enough — your body still needs to *send it the right place*.

slides.title: K2 directs the traffic
slides.body: Vitamin K2 activates proteins that pull calcium *into your bones* — and help keep it out of soft tissue.

slides.title: Out of your arteries
slides.body: Those same proteins may help keep calcium from *hardening your arteries* — supporting flexible, cleaner blood vessels.

slides.title: Pair K2 with D
slides.body: Look for the *MK-7 form* of K2, and take it alongside vitamin D — they work as a team.

slides.title: Food sources count too
slides.body: Natto, hard cheeses, and egg yolks carry K2 — or a *D3 + K2* supplement covers both at once.

slides.title: Build *stronger bones* the smart way.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your supplements and nutrition in one place — so pairing K2 with vitamin D becomes a daily habit you don't forget.

caption:
Taking calcium and vitamin D isn't enough — you need something to aim it. 🦴

Vitamin K2 (look for MK-7) sends calcium into your bones and may help keep it out of your arteries. Pair it with D. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health keeps your supplement stack on track → link in bio.
youtube_title: Vitamin K2: Send Calcium To Your Bones, Not Your Arteries
